# 24. Respond to any complaints made against you professionally

Theme: [Promote Professionalism and Trust](theme-4-promote-professionalism-and-trust.md)

## To achieve this, you must:

- **24.1** Never allow a complaint to affect the care provided
- **24.2** Use all complaints as feedback and an opportunity for reflection and learning
